## Summary

Describe the bug in one or two sentences.

## Expected Behavior

What should happen?

## Actual Behavior

What happens instead?

Provide the smallest possible reproducible example.


```css
/* Replace with relevant overrides */
```

## Accessibility Impact

Check all that apply:

- [ ] keyboard users
- [ ] touch users

## Additional Context

Add screenshots, recordings, or related links if helpful.
